title: NPM package not found in n8n Docker image
symptom: When trying to use the 'word-extractor' package in n8n, an error occurs stating 'Cannot find module ‘word-extractor’'. This prevents the workflow from executing properly.
applies_when: Attempting to use a custom NPM package
not_this_if: Using a version of n8n later than 2.13.0
root_cause: The error occurs because the specific version of n8n being used (2.2.6) has a bug that prevents custom NPM packages from being recognized. This issue was resolved in a later version (2.13.0).
fix_steps: Upgrade n8n to version 2.13.0 or later
Rebuild the Docker image after upgrading
agent_instruction: Upgrade n8n to version 2.13.0 or later and rebuild your Docker image.
